scope: Classifies supplied hoop-conjecture, cosmic-censorship, analog-black-hole, and interacting-dark-sector sources without promoting any theorem, empirical validation, or gravity closure claim.

sources.title: Comments on the non-existence of unified hoop conjecture
sources.alignment: Hoop-conjecture non-unification / restricted exception signal; supports boundary discipline against unrestricted hoop-conjecture promotion.

sources.title: Hoop conjecture for colliding black holes
sources.alignment: Analytic black-hole collision source supporting hoop-conjecture relevance in a special collision geometry.

sources.title: Analog charged black hole formation via percolation: Exploring cosmic censorship and Hoop conjecture
sources.alignment: Analog percolation model source for charged black-hole formation, cosmic censorship, and hoop-conjecture intuition; not a GR theorem.

sources.title: Saturation Mechanisms in the Interacting Dark Sector
sources.alignment: Interacting dark-sector model with saturation/sparseness parameter and observational-constraint discussion.

sources.title: New perspectives from matter creation cosmologies to dark sector interactions
sources.alignment: Matter-creation cosmology / interacting-dark-sector equivalence source signal.
